重大頭條（股市相關） ·

SanDisk 分拆後漲勢稱冠那斯達克 100，外媒點名 2026 強勢預期Post-Spin SanDisk Leads Nasdaq 100 Surge as Media Eye 2026 Upside

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461098

  • AI 基建題材推升那斯達克，分拆後的 SanDisk 今年來漲幅超前指數成份，外媒亦討論其至年底的相對強勢可能。
  • 二〇二五年初自威騰分拆獨立後，股價曾出現劇烈反彈；威騰早年併購後，不到十年又將其分拆重塑版圖。
  • 重整後業務涵蓋消費與企業儲存、邊緣與資料中心，財報顯示季營收大增並由虧轉盈，獲利明顯改善。
  • 管理層給出偏高的下一季營收區間，市場解讀為 AI 資料與算力需求持續支撐高階儲存與記憶體供需。
  • 分析師將 AI 基建視為那斯底克主軸，英特爾與多家儲存廠被點名在不同環節受惠於擴張投資。

素材指 SanDisk 分拆後股價與獲利急劇好轉，季報優於預期且展望偏強，反映 AI 帶動的儲存需求；同文也將其與那斯達克 AI 基建主線及同業競合一併討論。

  • AI infrastructure is boosting the Nasdaq; after its spin-off, SanDisk’s YTD gain led Nasdaq 100 peers as outlets debate 2026 leadership.
  • It split from Western Digital in early 2025 and saw a sharp rebound; WD had bought SanDisk years earlier, then carved it out again.
  • The refocused mix spans devices, edge, and data-center flash; recent results showed a big revenue jump and a swing to strong profit.
  • Guidance implies robust next-quarter sales, read as ongoing AI data and compute build-outs lifting advanced memory and storage demand.
  • Analysts call AI build-outs a key 2026 driver, citing Intel plus storage names as beneficiaries across the AI hardware stack.

Excerpts say SanDisk’s WD spin-off sparked a huge rally; strong quarterly beats and upbeat sales guidance mirror AI storage demand, with analysts fra…
